text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 282 

PRE_ICL_OONP_COINS_1M 

LABEL: Pre-ICL Out-of-Network Pharmacy Coinsurance — One-Month Supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-insurance percentage for a one-month supply of the drugs 
on this tier, using an out-of-network pharmacy (OONP) during the pre-initial coverage limit (ICL) phase 
of the Part D benefit. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12
